title: Malang
desc: Advait and Sara meet at a rave party in Goa, and their short romance soon turns into love. But trouble begins when their paths cross with two police officers, leading to unexpected twists.

title: Laddu Babu
desc: A young, handsome man becomes extremely obese after a mosquito, laden with an unusual virus, bites him. Soon, he sets out on a pursuit of a girl who will love and accept him for who he is.

title: Anaconda The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
desc: A corporation funds a team of biologists to journey deep into the Amazon rainforest to retrieve the blood orchid, a flower that may hold the secret to eternal youth.

title: Sookshmadarshini
desc: Sookshmadarshini

title: Legend The Terror
desc: A battle of survival where a brave hero faces ruthless enemies, standing strong with courage and resilience in a terrifying fight against destruction.

title: Rama Rao On Duty
desc: An honest cop probes his ex-girlfriend's missing husband case and uncovers a red sandalwood smuggling scam.

title: Jumanji: Welcome To The Jungle
desc: When four teenagers discover an old video game console, they are drawn into game Jumanji's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose.

title: Rudra Avatar
desc: Retired ACP Pon Manickavel returns to action when a brutal murder shocks the city. Clever twists and thrilling chases await in this gripping whodunit.
